content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Skyscrapers (hard version)". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1313/problem/C2
constraints: The input grid will only contain '0' and '1' characters.
The number of '1' characters in each row and column will be between 0 and n (inclusive).
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of rows and columns in the grid. Then n lines follow, each containing a string of length n. Each character in the string is either '0' or '1', indicating an empty space or a skyscraper respectively.
content.outputFormat: Output the final state of the grid after all possible moves have been made, with '0' representing an empty space and '1' representing a skyscraper.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use a backtracking algorithm to try all possible placements of skyscrapers in the grid, ensuring that each row and column contains the correct number of skyscrapers.
